zh.summary: PRISM-MCTS通过使用过程奖励模型和动态记忆在搜索轨迹间共享洞见来提高推理效率，将计算需求减半，同时在推理基准上超越传统MCTS性能。这展示了更高效的推理扩展。

title: Automated Auditing of Hospital Discharge Summaries for Care Transitions
summary: An automated LLM framework audits hospital discharge summaries against care transition requirements, identifying missing documentation that drives readmissions at scale. This enables systematic quality improvement in electronic health records beyond manual review capacity.
content:
arXiv:2604.05435v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Incomplete or inconsistent discharge documentation is a primary driver of care fragmentation and avoidable readmissions. Despite its critical role in patient safety, auditing discharge summaries relies heavily on manual review and is difficult to scale. We propose an automated framework for large-scale auditing of discharge summaries using locally deployed Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach operationalizes core transition-of-care requirements such as follow-up instructions, medication history and changes, patient information and clinical course, etc. into a structured validation checklist of questions based on DISCHARGED framework. Using adult inpatient summaries from the MIMIC-IV database, we utilize a privacy-preserving LLM to identify the presence, absence, or ambiguity of key documentation elements. This work demonstrates the feasibility of scalable, automated clinical auditing and provides a foundation for systematic quality improvement in electronic health record documentation.

zh.title: 医院出院总结自动审计以实现医疗转换
zh.summary: 自动化LLM框架根据医疗转换要求审计医院出院总结，识别导致大规模再入院的缺失文件。这使得超越手动审查容量的电子健康记录中的系统质量改进成为可能。

title: Adaptive Serverless Resource Management via Slot-Survival Prediction and Event-Driven Lifecycle Control
summary: The framework reduces serverless cold starts by 51.2% and improves cost-efficiency by 2x through predictive slot survival and event-driven resource lifecycle management. This addresses core serverless computing challenges of performance unpredictability and cost waste.
content:
arXiv:2604.05465v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Serverless computing eliminates infrastructure management overhead but introduces significant challenges regarding cold start latency and resource utilization. Traditional static resource allocation often leads to inefficiencies under variable workloads, resulting in performance degradation or excessive costs. This paper presents an adaptive engineering framework that optimizes serverless performance through event-driven architecture and probabilistic modeling. We propose a dual-strategy mechanism that dynamically adjusts idle durations and employs an intelligent request waiting strategy based on slot survival predictions. By leveraging sliding window aggregation and asynchronous processing, our system proactively manages resource lifecycles. Experimental results show that our approach reduces cold starts by up to 51.2% and improves cost-efficiency by nearly 2x compared to baseline methods in multi-cloud environments.

zh.title: 通过插槽生存预测和事件驱动生命周期控制的自适应无服务器资源管理
zh.summary: 该框架通过预测插槽生存和事件驱动资源生命周期管理，将无服务器冷启动减少51.2%，改进成本效率提升2倍。这解决了无服务器计算中性能不可预测性和成本浪费的核心挑战。

title: OntoTKGE: Ontology-Enhanced Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation
summary: OntoTKGE enhances temporal knowledge graph extrapolation by leveraging ontological hierarchy to enable sparse-history entities to inherit behavioral patterns, significantly improving prediction accuracy. This demonstrates how semantic structure improves reasoning in knowledge systems.
content:
arXiv:2604.05468v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) extrapolation is an important task that aims to predict future facts through historical interaction information within KG snapshots. A key challenge for most existing TKG extrapolation models is handling entities with sparse historical interaction. The ontological knowledge is beneficial for alleviating this sparsity issue by enabling these entities to inherit behavioral patterns from other entities with the same concept, which is ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework OntoTKGE that leverages the ontological knowledge from the ontology-view KG (i.e., a KG modeling hierarchical relations among abstract concepts as well as the connections between concepts and entities) to guide the TKG extrapolation model's learning process through the effective integration of the ontological and temporal knowledge, thereby enhancing entity embeddings. OntoTKGE is flexible enough to adapt to many TKG extrapolation models. Extensive experiments on four data sets demonstrate that OntoTKGE not only significantly improves the performance of many TKG extrapolation models but also surpasses many SOTA baseline methods.

zh.title: OntoTKGE：本体增强的时间知识图谱外推
zh.summary: OntoTKGE通过利用本体层级结构，使历史数据稀疏的实体能够继承行为模式，从而增强时间知识图谱外推，显著提高预测准确性。这演示了语义结构如何改进知识系统中的推理。

title: Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: GMRL-BD identifies topics where black-box LLMs produce biased answers through reinforcement learning and knowledge graph exploration with minimal queries, revealing widespread bias across major models. This addresses the critical need to understand which domains are trustworthy for each LLM.
content:
arXiv:2604.05483v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

zh.title: 我们能信任黑盒LLM吗？通过偏差扩散和多智能体强化学习进行LLM不可信边界检测
zh.summary: GMRL-BD通过强化学习和知识图谱探索，用最少的查询识别黑盒LLM产生偏见答案的主题，揭示了主流模型中的广泛偏见。这解决了理解每个LLM哪些领域可信的关键需求。

title: Auditable Agents
summary: The paper establishes auditability—the system property enabling accountability—as essential for deployed agents, defining five dimensions and identifying practical enforcement mechanisms. This is foundational because agent systems that act in the world must remain accountable after deployment.
content:
arXiv:2604.05485v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: LLM agents call tools, query databases, delegate tasks, and trigger external side effects. Once an agent system can act in the world, the question is no longer only whether harmful actions can be prevented--it is whether those actions remain answerable after deployment. We distinguish accountability (the ability to determine compliance and assign responsibility), auditability (the system property that makes accountability possible), and auditing (the process of reconstructing behavior from trustworthy evidence). Our claim is direct: no agent system can be accountable without auditability.
  To make this operational, we define five dimensions of agent auditability, i.e., action recoverability, lifecycle coverage, policy checkability, responsibility attribution, and evidence integrity, and identify three mechanism classes (detect, enforce, recover) whose temporal information-and-intervention constraints explain why, in practice, no single approach suffices. We support the position with layered evidence rather than a single benchmark: lower-bound ecosystem measurements suggest that even basic security prerequisites for auditability are widely unmet (617 security findings across six prominent open-source projects); runtime feasibility results show that pre-execution mediation with tamper-evident records adds only 8.3 ms median overhead; and controlled recovery experiments show that responsibility-relevant information can be partially recovered even when conventional logs are missing. We propose an Auditability Card for agent systems and identify six open research problems organized by mechanism class.

zh.title: 可审计代理
zh.summary: 该论文将可审计性（实现问责的系统属性）确定为已部署代理的必要条件，定义了五个维度并识别了实际执行机制。这是基础性的，因为在现实中行动的代理系统必须在部署后保持可问责。
